exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(o.OwnerId,1,1)='#' THEN substr(o.OwnerId,2) ELSE o.OwnerId END) AS AgentId, 
       SUM(CAST(TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(oi.Quantity,1,1)='#' THEN substr(oi.Quantity,2) ELSE oi.Quantity END) AS FLOAT) * CAST(TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(oi.UnitPrice,1,1)='#' THEN substr(oi.UnitPrice,2) ELSE oi.UnitPrice END) AS FLOAT)) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(o.Id,1,1)='#' THEN substr(o.Id,2) ELSE o.Id END) = TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(oi.OrderId,1,1)='#' THEN substr(oi.OrderId,2) ELSE oi.OrderId END)
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(o.OwnerId,1,1)='#' THEN substr(o.OwnerId,2) ELSE o.OwnerId END) AS AgentId, 
       SUM(CAST(TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(oi.Quantity,1,1)='#' THEN substr(oi.Quantity,2) ELSE oi.Quantity END) AS FLOAT) * CAST(TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(oi.UnitPrice,1,1)='#' THEN substr(oi.UnitPrice,2) ELSE oi.UnitPrice END) AS FLOAT)) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(o.Id,1,1)='#' THEN substr(o.Id,2) ELSE o.Id END) = TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(oi.OrderId,1,1)='#' THEN substr(oi.OrderId,2) ELSE oi.OrderId END)
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
